attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.MESSAGE_3B18_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.PARTNER_3B18_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.PARTNER_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.MFG_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ACTION_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.TRANSMISSION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.LOG_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.RETRY_COUNT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ERROR_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.EMAIL_NOTIFICATION, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.REASON, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.FUNC_ACK_CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.FUNC_ACK_LAST_UPDATED_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.CISCO_DUNS_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.CARRIER_PICK_UP_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS,
 (
 select MESSAGE_3B18_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS
 minus
 select MESSAGE_3B18_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.MESSAGE_3B18_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.MESSAGE_3B18_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_PARTNERS.REFRESH_DATETIME
